overview: BioLearn Academy is an interactive biology and biotechnology education platform with rich animated visuals, detailed explanations written in a warm conversational tone, and beginner-friendly quizzes covering everything from biomolecules to CRISPR.
features: Conversational, mentor-like writing throughout all topics
Light airy background palette across all sections
Animated 2D cell, DNA, and protein structure diagrams
Comprehensive coverage of biology and 8 biotechnology topics
Interactive quizzes with instant feedback after every topic
One-click sidebar navigation to any section
Full accessibility support with keyboard navigation and screen reader labels
